method: Chapman capture-recapture; single population; membership = two-stage abstract judge where abstract present, else memory harvest judgment (abstract-blind verdicts unreliable on seminal abstract-less papers); non-paper DOIs removed
caveats: abstract-availability bias: OpenAlex lacks abstracts for many seminal papers; those judged by memory not text
two heterogeneous capture channels (memory=old/seminal, search=recent/indexed) -> rough estimate
single membership judge per paper (no cross-judge vote)
